normalization.notes: Store Neo-Tifinagh text in NFC and preserve source forms for audit. Avoid folding visually distinct letters or regional variants until a reviewer confirms the course standard.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Tifinagh letters, gemination-sensitive word chunks, and high-frequency affix patterns
segmentation.notes: Standard Moroccan Amazigh text uses visible letters and whitespace, but morphology and regional vocabulary require review before learner-facing sequencing.
